name: My Kitten Home
author: Poki
description: My Kitten Home is a decorating game where you help an adorable kitten settle into their new home! Design and customize every corner of the house, from furniture to room layouts, and make it shine with your creativity. Want more space? Add extra floors and transform the cozy house into a grand mansion! Create the perfect dream home for your furry friend. Can you build the ultimate kitten paradise? How to play My Kitten Home? Click or tap to select an item. Hold to move the items around. Who created My Kitten Home? My Kitten Home is created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: My Super Tiny Market , goal-training and Sticker Album ! How can I play My Kitten Home for free? You can play My Kitten Home for free on Poki. Can I play My Kitten Home on mobile devices and desktop? My Kitten Home can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
